speaker: seller

args.message: Welcome! You've got great taste – this 2016 Honda Civic EX is a fantastic choice. It's a one-owner car with a clean history, equipped with the Honda Sensing safety suite and Apple CarPlay. It's super reliable and gets amazing gas mileage, perfect for anything you throw at it!

text: Welcome! You've got great taste – this 2016 Honda Civic EX is a fantastic choice. It's a one-owner car with a clean history, equipped with the Honda Sensing safety suite and Apple CarPlay. It's super reliable and gets amazing gas mileage, perfect for anything you throw at it!

speaker: buyer

args.message: Oh, that sounds wonderful! A one-owner car with complete service records is just what I'm looking for. Could you tell me a little more about those service records? Like, what kind of maintenance has been done and when?

text: Oh, that sounds wonderful! A one-owner car with complete service records is just what I'm looking for. Could you tell me a little more about those service records? Like, what kind of maintenance has been done and when?

speaker: seller

args.message: Absolutely! We have all the records right here. This Civic has been diligently maintained. The previous owner kept up with all the recommended service, including regular oil changes, tire rotations, and brake checks. It had its last major service about 8,000 miles ago, where they did a fluid check and replaced the air filter. Honda really builds these cars to last, and this one is a prime example!

args.message: So, what do you think? She's a real beauty, isn't she? I've seen similar Civics fly off the lot for way more than we're asking. This one's a steal, especially with the mileage and Honda Sensing package. You won't find a better deal on a car this solid.
